property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Mastery: Stop a physical attack that has a base cost of 3 stages or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: SUCCESSFUL - Remove from the game up to 5 cards in your opponent's discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If this attack is Unstoppable, you may discard an opponent's Support in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If this attack is Unstoppable, your PUR gains +1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Look at your opponent's hand and choose a card. Your opponent cannot play or use a card with that title this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - You may use your Mastery 1 additional time this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Search your Life Deck for a Black styled Support and play it.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stops an energy attack that has a base cost of 1 stage or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you discarded one of your Supports from play this turn, you may put in play a Blue styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may discard one of your Blue styled Supports in play to discard up to 2 of your opponent's Supports in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - Discard an opponent's Support in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stop a physical attack. Your opponent's attacks gain "Unstoppable" and "Unpreventable" for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may discard one of your Blue styled Supports in play to gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Mastery: Increase the modifiers from your Mastery by +1 this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack. You may remove from the game a card in your discards to draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may search your Life Deck for a Blue styled Support and play it.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your next attack this turn costs -2 stages to a minimum of 1 and does +2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: CONSTANT - After one of your Blue styled physical attacks deals damage, you may remove from the game 1 card from your opponent's discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your opponent's MP loses 1 stage, and you may put up to 2 cards from your discards at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: You may discard one of your Blue styled Supports in play to make your opponent skip his next Attack Phase this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - While Tien is your MP, his PUR gains +1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: This personality cannot attack or refocus this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your styled attacks that cost 2 or more cost -1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may shuffle your hand into your Life Deck to draw 3 cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may choose to not discard to use your Mastery this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: This personality cannot attack or refocus this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have Goku, gain 2 stages, and your next attack this turn does +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You cannot win by Dragon Ball Victory until the end of this turn. Search your Life Deck for a Dragon Ball and put it in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: If your MP is Level 3, your opponent cannot play Events for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Return to its owner's hand a Namekian styled Support to draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your opponent cannot use Supports for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: SUCCESSFUL - You may discard an opponent's Support in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stop an energy attack of 4 base damage or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - You may use your Mastery during Power Up instead of your Attack Phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your MP is a Namek, the base damage for this atatck is 5 instead of AT.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Namek: For this turn, you may reveal a card from your hand for your Mastery instead of discarding it.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - Your Namekian Physical Combats cost -1 stage to a minimum of 1 this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stop a physical attack that has a base damage of 5 or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have 2 other Saiyans, gain 1 stage for each of your opponent's Supports.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - If this personality's current power rating is 1,000 or less, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: CONSTANT - Orange style Supports you play coast -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stop an energy attack of 5 base damage or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack, Shuffle up to 3 Orange styled Supports from your discards into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - Your opponent cannot use the effects of any Dragon Ball when he captures it or plays it.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - If this personality's current power rating is 1,000 or less, gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Reveal the top 6 card of your Life Deck. You may discard any of the revealed cards. Put the other cards on top of your Life Deck in any order.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If this personality's current power rating is 1,000 or less, triple the base damage of this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: CONSTANT- While you have 3 Orange style Supports, your Orange styled attacks gain, "SUCCESSFUL - Discard an opponent's Support in play."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Search your opponent's Life Deck for up to 3 different Supports and discard them.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Remove from the game up to 3 Physical Combat and/or Energy Combat cards from your opponent's discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have Nappa and Vegeta this attack's base damage is 5 instead of 3.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Attacks performed by your Saiyans do +3 damage for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack. The next card you play this turn costs -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you Refocus with this attack, its damage gains +1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If you Refocus with this attack, its damage gains +3.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: CONSTANT - When you Refocus an attack, your opponent takes 1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: SUCCESSFUL - Name a card. Search your opponent's hand for any copies of that card and discard them.

property.name: Text
property.value: 5, Mastery: When your opponent takes damage this turn, he skips his next attack phase this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: You may shuffle your hand into your deck to draw the same number of cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may have Saibamen as your Allies.) 2: If you have one or more other Saibamen, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If your MP is Saibamen, gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have any Saibamen personalities, draw 3 cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may take 1 damage to do +1 damage with this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: You may take 4 damage to do +4 damage with this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. Your opponent loses 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your discards contains 3 or more Saiyan styled cards, your PUR gains +1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may take 2 damage to do +2 damage with this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If you have Vegeta, this attack does +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you took 6 or more damage in this turn, remove from the game an opponent's Support.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may put in play a Saiyan styled Support from your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Prevent 1 damage from your opponent's next attack this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stop an energy attack. Your Allies' effects cannot attack, prevent damage or stop attacks this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you have Chiaotzu, this attack costs -1 stage.) 2: Draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: All of your Humans gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have only Humans, this attack does +1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: If you have only Humans, remove from the game an opponent's Support in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack that has a base cost of 2 stages or less. Draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If this attack is Unstoppable, gain 3 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If this attack is Unstoppable, it gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Discard a card from your hand to discard 2 cards at random from your opponent's hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Your opponent discards a card at random from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Shuffle into your Life Deck after use.) 1, Mastery: Stop a physical attack that has a base cost of 2 stages or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: SUCCESSFUL - If your opponent has more cards removed from the game than you, draw 2 cards and gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If this attack is Unstoppable, remove from the game an opponent's Support.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4, Mastery: Stop an energy attack. Your opponent cannot perform energy attacks this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may discard one of your Blue styled Supports in play to remove from the game this attack's damage instead of discarding it.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, you must play with your hand face-up on the table, and your physical attacks do +2 damage this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. Draw 2 cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Youe MP gains 1 stage for every 3 Supports in your discards (rounded down).

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Shuffle 4 cards from your discards into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: SUCCESSFUL - Remove from the game an opponent's Support.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: This personality cannot attack, refocus, prevent damage or stop attacks for this turn. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Attacks from your Named cards do +1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw a card. You may put 2 cards from your discards at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.) 2: While your MP is not at 0, your attacks from styled cards gain "Unstoppable" for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Draw the bottom card of your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - Choose up to 3 cards from your discards and put them at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If your opponent's MP is Saiyan, this attack does +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Your opponent's Attacks cost +1 stage for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have 4 or more Namekian styled cards in your discards, all your opponent's personalities lose 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack of 6 base damage or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Your opponent's PUR gains -2 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have 3 or more Namekian styled cards in your discards, your opponent's MP loses 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Draw the bottom card of your discards. If that card is Namekian styled, draw the bottom card of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Namek: If all the cards in your discards are Namekian styled, you may search your Life Deck for a copy of a card in your discards and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Draw a card for each of your Saiyans in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you performed one or more Saiyan styled attacks this turn, this attack gains "Unstoppable" and "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack that has base damage of 7 or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Put in play an Orange styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: This attack does +1 damage for each of your Orange styled Supports in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may discard one of your Orange styled Supports in play to search your Life Deck for an Orange styled Support and put it in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: Stop a physical attack. Search your Life Deck for 2 Orange styled Supports and put them in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: All your Allies gain 2 stages. Your opponent cannot use Supports for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may choose to not pay the costs of the first Orange styled Support that you play next turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. Search your Life Deck for an Orange styled Support and put in in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Shuffle 3 of your discards into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Prevent 2 damage from all of your opponent's attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If the next attack you perform this turn is a physical attack, it does +2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have 4 or more Red styled cards in your discards, all your opponent's Allies lose 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: SUCCESSFUL - Shuffle up to 3 Red styled cards from your discards into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have 4 or more Red styled cards in your discards, your MP's PUR gains +2 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: Discard up to 2 Supports in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: If you Refocus with this attack, its damage gains +4.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - You may discard a Support in play and gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. Your opponent takes 2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: Cards without Constant effects that you use as a defense cost -1 stage to use to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your next Red styled attack this turn gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - You may discard a Red styled card from your hand to draw 2 cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have 4 or more Saiyan styled cards in your discards, all your opponent's Allies lose 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may discard a card from your hand to draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 2: CONSTANT - After you paid the cost to perform a Saiyan Styled attack, you may gain 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: If your MP is not at 0, you may gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you performed 2 or more successful attacks this turn, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Search your Life Deck for a Saiyan styled Support and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. You may put in play a Saiyan styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: You may take 3 damage to do +3 damage with this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Remove from the game an opponent's Support.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: All your opponent's Saiyans and Nameks lose 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If the current power rating of one of your Allies is 1,000 or less, you may search your Life Deck for a Support and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your Saiyan styled physical attacks are put at the bottom of your Life Deck after use instead of discarded.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If this attack is Unstoppable, your opponent's base PUR is 0 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 3, Mastery: You may shuffle a Black styled card from your discards into your Life Deck to gain stages equal to that card's base damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from game after use.) 4: If this attack is Unstoppable, the next attack you perform with a Black styled card this combat gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: If this attack is Unstoppable, your opponent discards 2 cards from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat during your Attack Phase, you may discard a card from your hand to make your next Black styled attack this turn gain "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If this attack is Unstoppable, it gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: The costs of your Black styled cards gain -2 stages to a minimum of 1 for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If you Refocus with this card, you may put in play a Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: The first Blue styled physical attack you perform does +1 damage, the second does +2, the third does +3, and so on. This effect starts over at the start of each turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 6: You may discard one of your Blue styled Supports in play to gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: SUCCESSFUL - You may discard one of your Blue styled Supports in play to lower your and your opponent's MP to 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 3: Name a Blue styled Support. Search your Life Deck for all copies of that card and put them in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: Prevent 7 damage from an attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 4, Mastery: You may choose to not pay the costs for your Blue styled physical attacks this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: You may remove from the game a Blue styled card from your discards to shuffle into your Life Deck X Blue styled Supports from your discards. X = the number of stages in the removed card's base cost.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) Search your Life Deck for a Dragon Ball and play it.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent skips his next Attack Phase this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - At the start of each turn you may take 4 damage. If you do, your opponent cannot use his Mastery for that turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you have only Saiyans, this attack costs -1 stage and does +2 damage.) 3:

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Put 2 cards from your discards at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 8: Put your top 6 discards at the bottom of your Life Deck. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you Refocus with an energy attack that has a base cost of 3 stages or less, you may choose to not pay that cost.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: Stop a physical attack. Stop an attack in your opponent's next Attack Phase this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat during your Attack Phase, you may discard a card from your hand to gain 2 stages on your MP.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. Put a Namekian styled card from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 4, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Choose a personality in play to gain stages equal to the number of Namekian styled Energy Combats in your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: For this turn, you may put the bottom card of your discards at the bottom of your Life Deck after you take damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 5, Mastery: Your opponent cannot attack this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Your opponent's MP cannot gain stages this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: You may choose to not discard for your Mastery this turn. Your next attack this turn does +2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Put a physical attack from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If this personality's current power rating is 1,000 or less, this attack gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 3: CONSTANT - When you perform a successful attack, you may search your Life Deck for an Orange styled Support and put it in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from game after use.) 4: SUCCESSFUL - Shuffle all Orange styled Supports from your discards into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: CONSTANT - Once per turn, you may discard a card from your hand to stop an opponent's attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 4: SUCCESSFUL - You may draw a card for each of your Orange styled Supports.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 4, Mastery: If you have 4 or more Orange styled Supports with Constant effects in play, you may choose to not pay the costs for your Orange styled attacks this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent's effects cannot discard your Orange styled Supports in play that have Constant effects.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: When any player gains stages, increase that amount by +1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: All your Allies lose 1 stage. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: If you have only Saiyans, this attack does +2 damage. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: If this personality's power rating is less than your opponent's MP's, this attack does +AT damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4, Mastery: Search your Life Deck for up to 2 Red styled cards and put them in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: CONSTANT - When you Refocus an attack, your MP gains 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 3, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Discard a Red styled card from your hand to gain X stages. X = the base damage of the discarded card.

property.name: Text
property.value: When you Refocus with a styled attack, its cost gains -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Remove from the game an opponent's Support. Search your opponent's Life Deck for all copies of that card and remove them from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.) 0: Put the top 3 cards of your discards at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Saiyan styled attacks do +2 damage. You non-Saiyan styled attacks do -1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. Your opponent cannot attack in his next Attack Phase this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If your discards contain 4 or more Saiyan styled cards, your MP gains 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: You may search your Life Deck for a Saiyan styled Support and put it in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 3: CONSTANT - The first physical attack you perform each turn gains "Unpreventable" and "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Your other Saiyan styled attacks do +1 damage this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 2: CONSTANT - Your opponent's attacks do -1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (This personality cannot Refocus.) 3: This attack does +3 damage for each of your opponent's personalities.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 8: Your opponent loses 3 stages. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your Saiyan styled cards do +1 damage this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: Your next attack does +1 damage for each Style that appears in your discards.
